sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n6573" key="a)naqumi/ama" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀναθυμί-αμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n6573.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">result of exhalation,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1264.tlg001:2:196" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Chrysipp.Stoic.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.196</biblScope></bibl>, cj. in Zenoib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1264.tlg001:1:35" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.35</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
